mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_config_mail t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.id},'%')
AND t.smtp like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.smtp},'%')
AND t.port like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.port},'%')
AND t.mail like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.mail},'%')
AND t.password like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.password},'%')
AND t.nick_Name like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.nickName},'%')
AND t.status = #{castleConfigMailEntity.status}
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_config_mail t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.id},'%')
AND t.smtp like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.smtp},'%')
AND t.port like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.port},'%')
AND t.mail like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.mail},'%')
AND t.password like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.password},'%')
AND t.nick_Name like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.nickName},'%')
AND t.status = #{castleConfigMailEntity.status}
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleConfigMailEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_config_mail t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
